# VDAF test vectors

These fixtures are byte-equivalent to the CFRG `draft-irtf-cfrg-vdaf` v14
reference test vectors generated by
[`poc/gen_test_vec.py`](https://github.com/cfrg/draft-irtf-cfrg-vdaf/tree/main/poc).

The local copies were extracted from the bundled set in
`github.com/cloudflare/circl@v1.6.3/vdaf/prio3/testdata/` (gzip-stripped for
readability). Both ultimately derive from the CFRG generator output.

## License

The CFRG test vectors are published as part of the IETF draft and are not
themselves subject to copyright restrictions beyond IETF Trust legal
provisions for code components. The pass-through bundle in `cloudflare/circl`
is BSD-3-licensed; redistribution under the dual MIT/Apache-2.0 terms of
this repository is compatible.

## Spec target

| File pattern         | Spec section                              |
|----------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| `Prio3Count_*.json`  | draft-irtf-cfrg-vdaf-14 §7.4.1 Prio3Count |

## Refreshing

When `cloudflare/circl` bumps its VDAF target draft, re-extract:

    for f in Prio3Count_0 Prio3Count_1 Prio3Count_2; do \
      gunzip -c "$GOPATH"/pkg/mod/github.com/cloudflare/circl@<ver>/vdaf/prio3/testdata/${f}.json.gz \
        > testdata/fixtures/vdaf/${f}.json; \
    done

A native `go run ./cmd/gen-vdaf-fixtures` generator can replace this once
`pkg/dap` settles, removing the runtime dependency on a vendored copy.
